mapper.sql: id, book_name, author, publisher, isbn, category_id, stock, total_stock, description, cover, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM book WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM book WHERE isbn = #{isbn} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT b.id, b.book_name, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.stock, b.total_stock, b.description, b.cover, b.status, b.is_deleted, b.create_time, b.update_time FROM book b ORDER BY b.id DESC
SELECT FROM book WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (book_name, author, publisher, isbn, category_id, stock, total_stock, description, cover, status) VALUES (#{bookName}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{isbn}, #{categoryId}, #{stock}, #{totalStock}, #{description}, #{cover}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1))
mapper.update: UPDATE book book_name = #{bookName},author = #{author},publisher = #{publisher},isbn = #{isbn},category_id = #{categoryId},stock = #{stock},total_stock = #{totalStock},description = #{description},cover = #{cover},status = #{status}, WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE book SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE book SET stock = stock - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND stock > 0
UPDATE book SET stock = stock + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
